chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4969 of 2022 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.21133/2022 2.For hearing of main case. 25.03.2025 Mr.Arshad Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Mehreen Ibrahim, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Fahad Hussain, Advocate holding brief for Mr.Malik Naeem Iqbal, Advocate for Respondent (S.R.B) Per learned counsel for the petitioner the lis has be adjudicated finally by the Hon’ble Supreme Court of Pakistan in the case of M/s.A.J. Traders v. The Collector of Customs (Adjudication) Islamabad & others, reported as 2022 PTD 186 and states that this petition may be dismissed in the terms thereof. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
